title: Cricket Match Live Screening
summary: Hundreds of students gathered to celebrate Team India's historic victory at the live screening of the ICC Men's T20 World Cup.
description: ABVP Tripura University successfully organized a grand live screening of the ICC Men's T20 World Cup at the Open Theatre. Hundreds of students came together to celebrate Team India's historic victory, reflecting the spirit of unity, enthusiasm, and national pride.
highlights: Live screening at the Open Theatre
